code: import{Navigate,Outlet,useLocation}from'react-router-dom';import{useAuth}from'../context/AuthContext';import LoadingSpinner from'./LoadingSpinner';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const ProtectedRoute=()=>{const{isAuthenticated,loading}=useAuth();const location=useLocation();if(loading){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(LoadingSpinner,{fullScreen:true,label:"Loading your dashboard"});}if(!isAuthenticated){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Navigate,{to:"/admin/login",replace:true,state:{from:location}});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Outlet,{});};export default ProtectedRoute;
